Its really simple

Your Units can only “Remember” so much from a chaos run. This is Save Data Limit.

When you start a chaos run you have your team has a certain amount of “mental memory” (Faint Memory from here on out.) 

Everything from Card Removal to Divine Epiphanies costs a certain amount of Faint Memory. 

Your Faint Memory Budget is raised with difficulty

If you exceed your budget, the game will just random remove stuff from extra cards to divine epiphanies

When you divide a number x by a number y, you're actually multiplying a by the multiplicative inverse of y which is 1/y. When a number is multiplied by its multiplicative inverse, you get as a result 1. So actually, if you try to divide by 0, you're trying to multiply a number by the multiplicative inverse of 0. However, everything multiplied by 0 = 0, which means that 0 don't and cannot have a multiplicative inverse which, in turn, means that you can't divide by 0.
